title: MosaicCoder
body: # MosaicCoder [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/mosaiccore-a?style=for-the-badge&label=required&color=5d1b96)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mosaiccore) ## What is MosaicCoder Simple config library build on top MosaicCore, which is build around DFU (codecs). ## Features ### DFU support Most features in library are build around DFU, giving very powerful tool to decode and encode data. Also giving support to multiple languages (by default it supports json). ### Simplicity The library itself is composed of multiple functions which can be used to read, create and write config files. ## Documentation Check out [github.com/MosaicMC/MosaicCoder#readme](https://github.com/MosaicMC/MosaicCoder#readme) for more informations!
